purpose: One gem/totem per life area (today the UI uses Lucide icons). 1024x1024, transparent background. area_type values match the life_areas table.
shared_prompt_body: mystical kingdom totem gem, 3D rendered, faceted crystal core with a carved stone frame and jungle vines, teal and gold dark-fantasy palette, soft inner glow, transparent background, premium mobile-game quality, no text

items.prompt: Kingdom totem gem: a heart-shaped emerald crystal with a gentle pulse of light and a leaf motif. Faceted crystal with carved stone frame and jungle vines, teal-gold dark-fantasy palette, soft inner glow, transparent background, 1024x1024, no text.
